v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_chec.name: v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_check
v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_chec.value: ("v2_messages"."agent_run_segment" = 0 and "v2_messages"."agent_run_segment_final") or ("v2_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "v2_messages"."agent_run_id" is not null)

v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_che.name: v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_check
v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_che.value:
octet_length("v2_projects"."workspace_slug") between 38 and 64
        and right("v2_projects"."workspace_slug", 37) = '-' || "v2_projects"."id"::text
        and left("v2_projects"."workspace_slug", length("v2_projects"."workspace_slug") - 37)
          ~ '^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$'

v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair.name: v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair_check
v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair.value: ("v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_claimed_at" is null and "v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_lease_token" is null) or ("v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_claimed_at" is not null and "v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_lease_token" is not null)

v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check.name: v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check
v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check.value:
(
        ("v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."status" = 'leased' and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is not null and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or
        ("v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."status" <> 'leased' and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is null and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null)
      )
